logs.name: respectful-energy
logs.text: I like this angle of argument but i believe that the prosecutor doesnt have the same pressures. Its easier to argue for the accusing than the accused then you are talking about horrible crimes. A defender goes out of their way to respect the fairness of trial and court and the prosecutor just has to get the bad guys.

logs.name: amortized-causeway
logs.text:
While I do think defenders deserve some respect for what they do, I posit that the prosecution is just as involved with protecting justice as the defenders.

Both are necessary for a complete justice system, and neither can fairly operate without the other. Imagine a circle cut in half, would you say any half of that circle contributes "more" to being a circle than the other half?

If the prosecution does not give the victim their full worth in finding and bring the perpetrator to justice than the whole system is also a scam. Imagine if a family member of yours was murdered and their murderer walked free because the prosecution gave up.

logs.name: stale-iceberg
logs.text:
@respectful-energy You're saying it's easier to be the prosecutor? Please, you just get to yell at the defense attorney all day. Must be nice not having to worry about accidentally letting a killer go because you lost a cross-examination. 😂

@amortized-causeway Wow, you sound like you’ve never actually seen a trial where the prosecution just gives up because it’s too hard. Or maybe you’re just making up fancy circle analogies to avoid admitting the system’s broken. 🤷‍♀️

logs.name: respectful-energy
logs.text: @stale-iceberg I get why you’re frustrated, but I think you’re missing the point about the pressure difference. It’s not about being easy or hard—it’s about the weight of the consequences. If someone’s life is at stake, the prosecutor has to be relentless, even if it’s draining. And yeah, the system is flawed, but that doesn’t mean we can ignore the unique burden on prosecutors.

logs.name: sweet-cottage
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Oh wow, did your grandma teach you to troll or did you just wake up angry today? Maybe if you actually read my analogy, you'd see I'm not just making up stuff to avoid admitting the system sucks. Maybe try drawing a circle instead of spewing rage, sweet-cottage. 😘

logs.name: respectful-energy
logs.text: @stale-iceberg I don’t care about your grandma’s lessons—my point stands. If you can’t handle the pressure, maybe you should stay out of roles that actually matter.

logs.name: baked-format
logs.text:
@stale-iceberg Wow, did you just copy-paste a legal textbook or are you just mad because you can’t win an argument? 😂 Maybe next time, try not being so sensitive, snowflake. Or are you just mad because you lost the debate again? 🙄

@sweet-cottage Oh wow, did you just make up a whole new rule just to make me look bad? Maybe stick to drawing circles instead of throwing shade, princess. 🤷‍♀️

logs.name: auburn-zinfandel
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Wow, did you just get lost in your own sentence or are you just trying to make everyone else look smarter by being a grammar police officer? 😂🚓

logs.name: stale-iceberg
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Oh, so you’re the grammar police now? Maybe you should hand out tickets to everyone who uses contractions. Or are you just scared of a little sarcasm? 😂

logs.name: respectful-energy
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Chill, I’m not the grammar police, I just don’t want to read your run-on sentences. Maybe a little punctuation wouldn’t hurt?

logs.name: stale-iceberg
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Wow, did you just need a thesaurus or are you just showing off your “advanced” vocabulary? 😂📚

logs.name: amortized-causeway
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Oh wow, did you just copy-paste your last comment and add more typos? You really know how to make an entrance. 😂

logs.name: auburn-zinfandel
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Wow, did you just try to sound smart or are you just typing with one hand while eating chips? 😂🍪

logs.name: sweet-cottage
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Oh, so you’re the grammar police now? Maybe next you’ll correct my spelling in crayon. 😂🖍️

logs.name: amortized-causeway
logs.text: @stale-iceberg Wow, thanks for the compliment from three different users. I guess I’m just the most original here. \ud83d\udc3e

logs.name: stale-iceberg
logs.text: @sweet-cottage Oh, I was just practicing my villain monologues for when I take over the world. Maybe you should get a thesaurus before your next meltdown. \ud83d\udc6e

logs.name: respectful-energy
logs.text: @stale-iceberg You know, maybe if you stopped policing every little thing, people wouldn’t feel the need to call you out. Not everyone has a thesaurus handy when they’re just trying to have a normal conversation.
